experience.title: Development Manager (Tech Lead + Team Leadership)
experience.role_type: Hands-on technical leadership role: 90% coding (C++/C# production code daily), 10% management (meetings, roadmap, team coordination). CTO handles most management decisions - this is a tech lead who codes, not a pure people manager.

achievements.achievement: Write production C++/C# code daily (90% of time) architecting cross-platform test automation framework for Unreal Engine 4.27-5.6 using C++/C# and .NET to allow QA departments to automate game testing.
Develop backend services and APIs using C# and .NET for test automation platform infrastructure - hands-on implementation, not just oversight.
Developed an MCP (Model Context Protocol) server to expose company APIs and Unreal/Unity games to LLMs like Claude, demonstrating bleeding-edge AI integration skills and developer tooling expertise.
Lead 5-engineer team using agile development methodologies in a fully remote environment while remaining hands-on with code implementation.
Created video tutorials, quickstart guides, and sample applications for game testing automation platform, helping game developers integrate test automation into Unreal Engine and Unity workflows.
Built comprehensive technical documentation, API references, and code examples demonstrating best practices for integrating test automation with Unreal Engine and Unity.
Engaged directly with developer community through support channels, Slack communities, and GitHub discussions, gathering feedback to inform product roadmap.
Served as voice of the developer internally, partnering with Product and Engineering to influence feature prioritization based on community feedback and developer pain points.
Established DevOps best practices including CI/CD pipelines, automated testing frameworks, and developer productivity tooling through hands-on implementation.
Built developer-facing APIs and SDKs with focus on developer experience (DX), ensuring clean abstractions, clear error messages, and intuitive workflows - personally writing production code daily.

experience.technologies: C#, .NET, C++, Unreal Engine, MCP, AI/LLM, Claude, Unity, Video Production, Technical Writing, Developer Advocacy

experience.title: President, CEO

achievements.achievement: As a partner in a two person software development studio along with my wife, I manage every aspect of the corporation, which focuses on iOS app development.
Built WordPress-based MLS integration system for real estate agents, using WordPress as a CMS platform with custom plugins to integrate Multiple Listing Service data feeds.
Developed custom WordPress plugins and themes to extend CMS functionality for client websites.
Past projects include casual word and physics games, with a recent focus on Augmented Reality apps for education.
Shipped 12 mobile titles (Android/iOS) using Unreal Engine with native SDK integration (Swift/Kotlin)
Engineered real-time multiplayer system, multiplayer puzzle games and integrated Apple apis including GameCenter and AR.

experience.technologies: iOS, Unreal Engine, Android, Swift, Kotlin, GameCenter, AR, multiplayer, WordPress, PHP, MLS integration, CMS

experience.title: Associate Dean

achievements.achievement: Led the technical curriculum updates across 11 STEM programs (2,000+ students).
Managed 11 program coordinators who each led their own teams of faculty, establishing performance frameworks, hiring pipelines, and professional development programs.
Directed 125+ total faculty and instructors (25+ full time, 100+ PT) in delivery of 200+ technical courses annually across 11 programs.
Spearheaded $1.2M industry partnerships for applied VR/AR research projects
Represented institution at technical conferences, meetups, and industry events across Greater Toronto Area, advocating for modern technology education.
Hosted Apple CEO Tim Cook for institutional visit, coordinating technical demonstrations and community engagement.
Led speaking engagements at educational technology forums and industry partnerships, building institutional reputation.
Built relationships with technology companies (Apple, Microsoft, Unity) to improve student/developer experience and platform adoption.

experience.technologies: VR, AR, STEM curriculum, Public Speaking, Event Hosting, Community Building

experience.title: Lead Technical Author

achievements.achievement: Co-authored 3 editions of industry-standard textbook "Fundamentals of Web Development"

The 3rd Edition adds to the fundamentals of HTML, CSS and Javascript, SQL and PHP, with topics including React, Node, CSS preprocessors, TypeScript, SQLite and NoSQL databases, GraphQL, CI/CD, microservice architectures and more.
Authored comprehensive CMS chapter covering WordPress plugin development, theme architecture, and content management best practices (2nd Edition).
Authored advanced chapter on search engine architecture covering indexing strategies, reverse indexing, search algorithms, and information retrieval techniques.
Content adopted by 200+ institutions and translated into several languages.

experience.technologies: HTML, CSS, JavaScript, React, Node.js, SQL, PHP, TypeScript, SQLite, NoSQL, GraphQL, CI/CD, microservices, WordPress, CMS, search engines, indexing

achievements.achievement: Led development of municipal transit tracking app (PHP/MySQL) handling 50k+ daily queries
Drove 50% enrollment growth through industry-aligned curriculum in Java/C++/iOS
Championed computer literacy outside the computer science discipline.
Led the merger of the Mathematics and Computer Science departments.

experience.title: Software Developer

achievements.achievement: Collaborated with designers and other programmers on web applications that support online shopping and insurance claim management.
This software studio used agile methodologies and fostered an open and agile work environment.
Development relied on a variety of technologies from Ruby on Rails through to JSP.

experience.technologies: Ruby on Rails, SQL, Java, JSP, LAMP, PHP, JavaScript

experience.title: Software Developer

achievements.achievement: This small software development studio required their software development systems, tools and practices be established from scratch to allow their mature GPS product to interface with modern web applications.
Prototypes I created were tested with HAWKS air ambulance and I designed and implemented redundant server systems to improve the reliability of relaying emergency signals from their GPS product.

experience.technologies: GPS systems, web applications, redundant server systems

experience.title: Web Architect

achievements.achievement: When hired I began by reducing the commission's website downtime from several minutes every hour to 0.
In addition I helped improve workflow for publication including both staging to production environments.
Developed dynamic fillable PDF systems for business process automation, including PDF parsing, generation, and form field manipulation.
I also worked with business units to improve processes using PDFs, web services and email system integration.

experience.technologies: CMS, web services, email integration, PDF processing, dynamic PDF generation

experience.title: Instructor
experience.company: University of Calgary, Faculty of Continuing Education (Part Time Contract)

achievements.achievement: As an instructor replacing a teacher on leave I taught adults the principals of introductory web design.
Student reviews were very good, and all students were able to learn and make progress on their grasp of web.

experience.title: Faculty Web Technical Administrator
experience.company: University of Calgary, Faculty of Social Sciences (Contract)

achievements.achievement: Deployed and configured dozens of Drupal-based websites for multiple departmental and research sites across the Faculty of Social Sciences.

I inherited a incomplete site and hacked file server when the previous contractor walked away, and within a week I had secured the file system and launched a system wide content management system to support multiple departmental and research websites.
I trained staff on usage of the sites and worked on internal asset management software for the faculty.
I also administered a cluster of redundant web and mail servers which supported those sites.
The university wide CMS, whose selection I participated in, remains in place to this day.

experience.technologies: Drupal, CMS, web servers, mail servers, file system security, PHP, MySQL

experience.title: Team Leader, Software Engineer

achievements.achievement: A venture initiative, aiming to supplant Google in Search and Apple in Music on a shoestring budget required their infrastructure and team to be built from the ground up.
This position required that I wear multiple hats including system administrator, programmer, designer, team leader and business analyst.

experience.technologies: system administration, search technology, music platforms

achievements.achievement: C++ programmer in a company that developed universal compilers.
Adhered to programming requirements, managed time sheets and installed systems.
